features.name: concurrent assertion with action block
features.description: Code should include an assert property concurrent assertion with an else clause action block containing a system task like $error

features.name: variable reference in assertion action block without $sampled
features.description: Code should include an assertion action block that references a variable directly (without $sampled) which causes SVA-NSVU lint warning
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clock) foo) else $error("value: %d", foo);

features.name: $sampled in assertion action block
features.description: Code should include an assertion action block that uses $sampled() to properly sample variables per SV 2017 spec section 16.9.3
